entry.title: Copy Version Master Data from Baseline to MD Specific Version with Advanced Filter
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm trying to do a Copy Version for Master Data, from Baseline version to a Master Data Specific Version, using an advanced filter. 

  • the MD that I'm trying to copy, has on key attributes: Product ID (key for MD Product), Location ID (key for MD Location) and another attribute called Source ID;
  • this is a Simple MD;
  • I'm trying to use a filter related to MD Product: Product Type; so I would like to copy only certain records that meet this requirement for Product IDs;

The Output is Master data type ZPTSOURCEPRODUCTION is not copied because of the incompatible filter. 

Thanks all for your time

entry.title: Re: How to delete Dependent Requirement in MD04
entry.content: Hi, same case happened for me but when see pegged requirement material, no requirement for that material and planned order as Nproc....please suggest any solution for this kind of issue how to delete /remove dependent requirement.

entry.title: Re: Restrict Data Import Connecation in SAC
entry.content:
Hi Niels,

Connections have similar sharing settings to what you find for a story or other SAC objects. From within the connections, select the connection that has been established (assuming you have access yourself) and then share it with the appropriate Team/s in SAC.

Be aware that depending on how the connection has been established, it may preserve the credentials that were used to establish it. You would need to understand if you want users to authenticate to the source system as themselves, or perhaps you have system integration accounts you prefer to use which would then have the credentials saved in the connection. Hope this is helpful. 

Cheers, Ivan.

entry.title: Re: Integration of SAP PAPM with SAP S/4HANA for Automated Master Data Retrieval?
entry.content:
Hello Kastolia,

May I ask to kindly confirm what is the concern here? It seems that it is incomplete. 
Thank you so much!

Best regards,
Kevin

Solution

I was also not able to see field in screen of MM42/43

the reason for that was I had config in Standard retail sequence

We are just entering our z fungrp in wrong place i have found this using try and error.

entry.title: Where can I learn how to execute and how to configure Profitability Accounting in Make-to-Order?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Evaluating Profitability Accounting in Make-to-Order Scenarios in SAP S/4HANA learning journey.


Overview
This learning journey empowers key business users and consultants to execute and configure Profitability Accounting in Make-to-Order business scenarios utilizing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Learning objectives
Upon completion of this learning journey, you will acquire an understanding of SAP S/4HANA, focusing on:

  • Grasping processes that generate actual data and plan data in Profitability Accounting and creating detailed reports.
  • Integrating Profitability Accounting into the Order-to-Cash process, specifically within MTO Make-to-Order business scenarios.
  • Applying CDS-based contribution margin reports in Profitability Accounting to produce informed analysis and decision-making. 

Prerequisites

  • Learning Journey: Outlining Cost Management and Profitability Analysis in SAP S/4HANA​

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: “SAP Profitability and Performance Management” - Impo...
entry.content:
Hi Simon,

Good day! 

Yes, it is possible to import environments (zip files) in SAP PaPM Cloud for both Standard Model (via Content Management) and Universal Model (via Manage Containers). Please see related blogposts for your reference:

a. SAP PaPM Cloud Standard Model: https://community.sap.com/t5/financial-management-blogs-by-sap/sap-papm-cloud-introducing-the-new-content-management-screen/ba-p/13580218

b. SAP PaPM Cloud Standard Universal:https://community.sap.com/t5/financial-management-blogs-by-sap/sap-papm-cloud-universal-model-deploy-your-environment-via-manage/ba-p/13674641

Thanks and regards,
Nica

entry.title: Customer Data Cloud

entry.title: Re: ERS Self-Billing Output Messages

entry.title: Re: Purchasing a discounted certification attempt
Re: The new SAP Digital Manufacturing for Insights, including MDOs, Operational Reports and Embedded
entry.content:
Hello @rgonzalez3 ,
As far as I know, there is currently no data retention policy in place and MDO data is currently stored indefinitely. This might change somehow in 2025, when cold storage introduction is planned as a roadmap item.
Br,
Manoel

entry.title: Re: The new SAP Digital Manufacturing for Insights, including MDOs, Operational Reports and Embedded

entry.title: Re: Currency translation have no data in group reporting module even all prerequisite have been met
entry.content: thanks for the screenshots - from my pov it looks fine (you are currently not using any rounding step in the C/T (rounding steps need to be flagged as such next to the sequence number) - are all relevant OSS message implement for your release - if, yes I would raise an OSS message

entry.title: Where can I find learning materials related to SAP Security fundamentals?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Exploring the Fundamentals of SAP System Security learning journey.


Overview
Learn the fundamental concepts and tools available to secure your SAP environments (Cloud and On-Premise).

Learning objectives
This course will prepare you to:

  • Understand SAP Security fundamentals
  • Get an overview of the main SAP concepts for security
  • Be prepared to learn more about each SAP concept for security

Prerequisites

 

  • SAPTEC

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: How to use SAP Activate methodology in multi-country deployment projects
entry.content: @JanMusil Good blog post! Would be interesting to bring this to the next level with specific guidance on how to best handle this with Cloud ALM. Happy to share some insights, as we are halfway in greenfield impl. with Cloud ALM and Enterprise Management Layer.

entry.title: Reprocess Bank Statement Items from Multiple Company Codes
entry.content:
Hi

For a client, we're upgrading from 1909 to 2023 FPS01. They have many payments coming into 1 company code that have to be cleared against customer items in 1 or more affiliate company codes. In the 1909 version of that app, if you use the "Select More" option to select items from other company codes, you can input the customer number without the company code, and it will return all items from multiple company codes. In 2023, when trying the same thing, you have to input the company code, so only items from that company code are returned. You can do that again to add more from another company code also, but it feels like a step backwards. Has anyone experienced this? I have found no notes on it, so unsure if it is a bug, or just a new "feature"!

Thanks

Finbar.

entry.title: SAP Joule
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I am currently supporting a client from the German SME sector who is using the SAP ERP system SAP ECC (Enterprise Core Component) and is planning a transition to the SAP Cloud. It is still unclear whether this will be implemented as an on-premise or private cloud solution. My role involves developing an AI strategy for the After-Sales and IT departments, with the goal (for the IT department) to improve data interaction and processes within the ERP system and therefore across all departments.

I have heard about SAP Joule and would like to understand how this system could integrate into my client’s existing structure. Additionally, I am interested in how advanced the solution currently is, the requirements for data preparation, and how Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) is supported. Currently, data maintenance is not in a format suitable for AI applications, which is a key factor in our planning.

Thank you in advance for any guidance you can provide!

entry.title: Re: I am and administrator, Where can I start learning how to set up SAP Signavio Process Insights?
entry.content: Very useful new Learning Journey on SAP Signavio Process Insights 🙏 Thanks for sharing!

entry.title: Re: How to trigger a workflow when doing a Temporary Chan...
entry.content:
@marcelo28 

Hello Marcelo,

unfortunately, this is a mistake in the documentation. We will correct it immediately.

At the moment the workflow is only supported for temporary changes in the ESS scenario. Not if a time admin creates it via the time admin workbench. 

So: workflow is supported if an employee request a temporary change via the ESS scenario. Not supported from the time admin workbench.

Best regards

Volker

entry.title: Re: Currency translation have no data in group reporting module even all prerequisite have been met

I have also just added the rounding steps but the result gave no difference comparing to previous situation. I am just thinking if it is due to any configuration in "Define Selection"

entry.title: Fiori mobile application direct print
entry.content:
Hi guys,

I have a odata service which returns bar code as raw string. I want to utilize it as direct print in my fiori screen without downloading in my mobile device.

NOTE : my odata service in xtream format 
( /sap/opu/odata/sap/ZMM_GRN_PROCESS_SRV_01/GRNPDFSet(PoNumber='')/$value )

Please put your thoughts.

entry.title: Re: How to Hide Query Panel
entry.content:
Hi Shiva,

I came across your question a bit late, but here’s a solution you could try. By adding the query to the main menu from the Query Manager, you can allow users to run it directly without displaying the SQL code.

Here’s how:

  1. Go to Query Manager and select the query you want.
  2. At the bottom, choose Assign to Menu.
  3. In the Query Menu Registration window, check the Menu Item box and select the desired menu and position.

This way, the query will execute without exposing the SQL details to users.

Hope this helps!

entry.title: 2411 Release Highlights of SAP Signavio Process Insights
entry.content:
SAP Signavio Process Insights November release 2411 is now generally available (GA) in all regions. My personal highlight 🎉 is the new start screen 🚀 . It allows you to create your own personal dashboards and fill them with the business content 🏭, recommendations 👩‍🔧 , and performance trends 📈 most relevant to you and your favorite area across multiple systems.


Of course 2411 provides a couple of other very important enhancements like:

  • sharing filters as public views,
  • blockers in process flows now also show trends,
  • trendlines can now also show monetary values,
  • industry benchmarks are now available for all customers,
  • exclusion rules as an important enhancement for the attribute-based access management
  • ... any many more.

Try it out and enjoy!!! Here is a quick demo of the new start screen dashboards:

Are you interested to learn more about the merits of Signavio Process Insights? Here you can see how to find ways to optimize your liquidity:

Here you can learn more:

  1. Your first steps to get started with SAP Signavio Process Insights
  2. Who do I need to involve and which challenges do I want to solve?
  3. How to start your analysis?
  4. “Cash is King” - but how to become royal? - SAP Community
  5. Why are there two business process analysis soluti... - SAP Community
  6. Plug & Gain:
    Plug & Gain OpenSAP
    How to use the Plug & Gain Connector
    Optimize financial closing process with Plug & Gain
  7. SAP Analytics Cloud Content for Process Insights
  8. SAP Learning:
    SAP Signavio Process Analysis
    SAP Signavio Process Management & Design
    SAP Signavio Solution Configuration
  9. Partner Edge (Login required): Webinar Series for Process Insights
  10. SAP Signavio Process Insights "Whats New?"
  11. SAP Signavio Process Insights Help

entry.title: Success and Error messages in RAP validation logic
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I am wandering if it is possible to issue both success and error messages in one validation handler and return both successful records and failed records back to the frontend? 

I have a scenario where e.g. 4 entities are submitted for backend processing. Two of these entities are failed, two are processed successfully. If I add two of failed entities to FAILED / REPORTED changing parameter of a method - the frontend receives a results with two error messages. And to the frontend it looks like that the whole request failed.

Is there a way to pass both successful and failed records back to the frontend - for the simple reason that I'd like to show to application users that, hey, there are two successful "bookings" and two failed ones (with the attached error messages)?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Price Settings in CPQ – BRIM S/4 Solution Quotation Integration
entry.content:
The jigsaw puzzle of Price Settings in the CPQ-BRIM scenario has few pieces, which once identified and outlined becomes easier to put together. There are multiple price related configurations that come together across these two applications and help us weave together this seamless price fabric across them. So let us try to see how all this fits and the different facets involved here for pricing at a high level.

The default configuration and pricing mechanism for SAP Billing Revenue and Innovation Management products in SAP CPQ is SAP Variant Configuration and Pricing

Some requirements that we need to consider are:

  • As part of BTP services, SAP Variant Configuration and Pricing (CPS) instance is integrated with SAP S/4 HANA and CPQ. Using this service configuration and prices of products are replicated from S/4HANA to CPQ.
  • For Products and Business Partners, S/4HANA is the leading system and replication framework needs to be in place to replicate this master data from S/4 to CPQ.
  • Markets also needs to be synchronized across both systems via manual creation loosely mapped to Sales Organization in S/4HANA.

Types of Pricing supported:

 

Stateless Pricing

Document Pricing

In Stateless Pricing, it’s not possible to change the pricing information arriving from SAP Variant Configuration and Pricing to SAP CPQ in the quote.

Document Pricing enables you to manually change the pricing information from SAP Variant Configuration and Pricing in the quote by mapping pricing conditions to fields in SAP CPQ.

 The behavior is Stateless, so no reference document is created on CPS side.

One Document is created in CPS. This same document is updated for every change done for Pricing of Product in CPQ, so CPS has a reference for the subsequent changes made to the product pricing.

Stateless call is made to CPS, so for every call to CPS complete information is sent to CPS as data isn’t persisted.

Only new changes done need to be passed to CPS as existing quote specific pricing details are persisted in the initial document created on CPS side. So, if the calling application relies on persistency of the Pricing service, then RESTful APIs must be used.

 

 

The focus of this blog here onwards is on Document Pricing; to focus on the flexibility this mechanism provides to the Sales rep for price modification in the quoting process.

Let us first try to understand how of the product price reflects in a CPQ Quote:

High-level Mapping:

Trailing backwards when Product price is reflecting in the CPQ quote in below systems:

SAP CPQ

SAP S/4 HANA

CPQ Field calculations according to

Calculations on Add/Copy/Delete Item 

Path: Set-up

-> Quotes

-> Fields, Calculations, Layout

-> Fields and Calculations

 

The above fields are mapped to

Pricing Procedure e.g. ZCPQBR

Path: ->Set-up

->Pricing/Calculations

 

Mapped to Pricing Procedure in SAP S/4 HANA system; TCode -> V/08

e.g. ZCPQBR

Markets (linked to Pricebooks)

Path: ->Set-up

->Pricing/Calculations

 

 

Markets in CPQ is loosely mapped to Sales Organisation, Distribution Channel, Division

The settings on the SAP General Attribute Mappings page must be used with the Quote-First Approach because the feature requires quote context.

 

 

SAP CPQ side price setting overview:

 

  • Pricebooks contains prices for products in SAP CPQ. In case of multiple prices for one product (discounts, special offerings, loyalty discounts, etc.), each price should be defined in a separate Pricebook. Multiple Pricebooks are grouped under a Market.

 

  • Markets : Market Definition factors are multiplied by the calculated currency to get the final price.

  • Pricing procedures are defined in SAP S/4HANA and consist of different pricing conditions. In SAP CPQ, you can map pricing conditions to quote item or header fields to send pricing data from the SAP CPQ quote to SAP S/4HANA. Standard SAP CPQ calculations can't be combined with calculations specifically used for pricing condition mapping. Following this step, you need to set the calculations according to the instructions described in Calculations for Variant Pricing Items.
    • When mapping pricing procedure conditions to SAP CPQ fields, there are limitations as to which combinations of values are allowed in the fields. More information around this can be found here.
    • Detailed instructions for mapping pricing conditions to quote item or header fields are available in Pricing Procedures from SAP Variant Configuration and Pricing.
    • Information about pricing conditions is stored in the PricingConditions node of the SAP CPQ Quotes API. Example

 

  • Fields, Calculations, Layout:
  • Set up Calculations on Item Add/Copy/Delete : The list of standard SAP CPQ calculations is expanded with additional calculations when the SAP CPQ - SAP Billing Revenue and Innovation Management integration is enabled. Some specific calculations need to be added to the list of calculations that are triggered whenever an item is added to the quote, as well as when the item is copied and deleted.
  • Set up Calculations on Field Value Changes: Some existing and new quote fields need to be set up in such a way that whenever their value is changed, a specific set of calculation is triggered (calculations that affect subscription products and service contract products).

 

SAP S/4HANA BRIM side price setting overview:

Master data for pricing conditions is stored in condition records. Levels on which pricing is performed is pre-defined in SAP S/4 systems. Conditions can be defined on any available key level and key levels also can be added as required.

In the condition table, you can determine whether a field appears in the header or in the item part of the fast entry screen that is generated for defining condition records. Condition records are always created by using a specific key. You use condition tables to define the structure of the keys for a condition record. You can define prices, discounts, and surcharges at various levels. Each level is defined by a condition table.

This search strategy defines the sequence in which the system reads all the condition records created for that condition type. An access sequence can be assigned to each condition type, except for those that are configured as header conditions.

A condition type is like a format for one part of the overall pricing calculation. Condition types define how an individual or specific pricing calculation will take place and serve as the template or pattern for condition records. Examples can be referred to here.

 

Pricing procedures is defined in S/4 HANA contains a variety of attributes that can influence the processing of individual condition types. All condition types that are permitted for a transaction in pricing are contained in the pricing procedure.

How Condition Technique Elements Work Together

 

High-Level Product and Price flow

Once Pricing elements and necessary configurations for Products is done in S/4 HANA BRIM and CPQ, a sales rep can create a quote in CPQ with Products characterized by prices and configurations from S/4. When the transactional document e.g. Subscription Order is created in S/4 HANA BRIM for this quote, the subsequent prices and configurations of Products are reflected in Solution Quotation.

 

Product and Quote example glimpses:

Examples in SAP Help portal can be referred to for further reference on Master Data Creation.

CPQ Quote:

S/4 HANA BRIM Solution Quotation:

entry.title: Latest Premium Qualification news for SAP Account Substantiation and Automation, by BlackLine
entry.content:
Balance sheet account substantiation is a key closing task for many accountants, especially in regions with advanced reporting requirements or when the systems environment is heterogenous.

For the task of balance sheet account substantiation, as well as other capabilities like advanced intercompany origination of non-trade activities, transaction matching, journal entry automation, and others, SAP has partnered with BlackLine to deliver solutions that increase automation and ensure compliance.

The cooperation level we have with BlackLine is at the Solution Extension level, which means that not only does SAP ensure the technical compatibility of the solutions, but also the end-to-end process governance and adherence to our product standards. 

In early November, the SAP team is pleased to announce the next round of Premium Qualification of our solutions, SAP Account Substantiation and Automation 7.42.01 by BlackLine and SAP Intercompany Governance 5.9.00 by BlackLine, origination option.

These solutions help SAP customers automate key manual activities that could otherwise slow the financial close, support end-to-end accounting processes, and agree on the terms and conditions governing complex non-trade intercompany transactions up-front, to ensure a smooth matching process at period-end.

This extensive testing regime is designed to make sure that our customers have the best possible experience using our joint solutions. 

Thanks to my SAP colleagues Sushant Ranjan, Marek Nemecek, Srinivasan Ramaswamy, Saurabh Bhalla, and Pete Graham, and our BlackLine partners Guido Buitendijk, Stephen Wolfman, and Nayan Kapadia for making it happen! We are BetterTogether!

entry.title: internal table data not getting reflected in adobe form when calling from driver program
entry.content:
I have created adobe form and calling adobe form from the driver program. I have issue in moving data of internal table lt_zmatvaliditem of custom table from
report program into the adobe form internal table gt_zmatvaliditem .
Before calling of the adobe form , I can see 10 records in the internal table lt_zmatvaliditem.
In debugging mode when the control jumps into the code initialization I have metioned the internal table in import and export parameters.

I can see in debugging mode gt_zmatvaliditem no. of records is zero.

Things I have checked ::
I have created structure in DDIC ZSTMATVALIDITEM and table type ZTTMATVALIDITEM with same structure.
This table type I have mentioned in import parameters gt_zmatvaliditem type ZTTMATVALIDITEM.

I don't think other than this any other thing needs to be done . I was expecting gt_zmatvaliditem with 10 records which is not reflecting.

can some one tell me what could be stopping the movement of data between internal table of report program lt_zmatvaliditem and adobe form gt_zmatvaliditem .

 

is there any  issue in this structure. I have checked it with database table only mandt is not mentioned here.

Pleae help me as I have to submit by the end of the day.

entry.title: Re: Currency translation have no data in group reporting...
entry.content: I assume in the selection you only have FS item and Subitem included. If yes, I have currently no idea what else could cause the problem.

entry.title: Re: send email into multiple email groups
entry.content:
Hi Zdenek,

You can send email to multiple customer/vendor groups or defined distribution lists, as shown in the screenshot below.

In the "Add Recipient" window, click the "BP" button to select the desired group. If you want to select more than one group, you can do so as well.

Alternatively, you can create your own distribution list (which can contain multiple groups) in the "Send Message" window:

 

Hope this helps!

Best regards,
Nofar

entry.title: Re: Quota Type Inconsistences in automatic accrued quota.
entry.content: in old system time evaluation works flawlessly

entry.title: Change service order notification header using BAPI_ALM_ORDER_MAINTAIN
entry.content:
Hello SAP community, 

We want to update header notification for an already existing service order with already created notif.

I have one service order eg: NZ12YBO00085 to which a header notification is already assigned eg :301714374 , this notification exists also in object list. what i want to do is to update header notification to another one eg: 301714338 and adding this once also to object list. i tried using BAPI BAPI_ALM_ORDER_MAINTAIN like follow: 

in table IT_HEADER , i put service order ID NZ12YBO00085 and new notif ID 301714338 

in table IT_HEADER_UP : i put service order ID NZ12YBO00085 and i put 'X' in notif number

in table IT_OBJECTLIST : i put NOTIF_NO : 301714338 and COUNTER : 0

in table IT_OBJECTLIST_UP: i put 'X' in PROCESSING_IND

But i'm getting this result, and nothing is done notif is not updated neither added to object list

I tried with COMMIT also, tried just method change without create objeect list but still nothing is changed. Could anyone help please ?

Thank you

Please suggest.

Thank you!

Regards,

Naveen

entry.title: Re: Is AEM adapter available in NEO environment ?
entry.content: Thanks for your response. I need to use AEM to meet EOIO requirements. I understand that AEM is primarily designed for CF, but my question is: is it possible to use an AEM adapter on NEO?

entry.title: Poor performance in API API_SALES_ORDER_SRV GET method - order reading
entry.content:
Hello,

in S4 hana 107 we have an issue with very poor performance during a single sales order reading via GET method of API API_SALES_ORDER_SRV.
We are trying to read a sales order header, all order items and schedule line information related to sales order items.
The issue seems to be in selecting data from a view A_SALESORDERSCHEDULELINE which contains about 700 million records.

Example:
/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_SALES_ORDER_SRV/A_SalesOrder('XYZ')?$expand=to_Item,to_Item/to_ScheduleLine

Test 1: OK.
Reading a sales order with only one item - takes a miliseconds - no performance issue here.

Test 2: Performance issue.
Reading a sales order with two items takes about 90 seconds.
If tha sales order has more than two items the performance is far more worse.

Details from debugging:

Performance issue is only here - data selection from A_SALESORDERSCHEDULELINE:

this code is executed:
CL_SADL_SQL_EXECUTOR->SELECT
...
ELSEIF <clauses>-offset = 0 OR <clauses>-offset > 0 AND <clauses>-order_by IS INITIAL.
SELECT (<clauses>-select) FROM (<clauses>-from) "#EC CI_DYNTAB
WHERE (<clauses>-where) "#EC CI_DYNWHERE
GROUP BY (<clauses>-group_by)
HAVING (<clauses>-having)
ORDER BY (<clauses>-order_by)
%_HINTS HDB @db_hints "#EC CI_HINTS
INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE @ET_data
EXTENDED RESULT @LO_extended_result
UP TO @<clauses>-limit ROWS
CONNECTION (lv_dbcon)
%_native_end( hdb = @<clauses>-locale, otherwise = `` ).
...

FROM
<clauses>-from = A_SALESORDERSCHEDULELINE AS A_SALESORDERSCHEDULELINE

WHERE
<clauses>-where =
( A_SALESORDERSCHEDULELINE~SALESORDER, A_SALESORDERSCHEDULELINE~SALESORDERITEM ) IN ( ( 'XYZ', '000010' ), ( 'XYZ', '000020' ) )

*Hint:
In the debugger if we replace the original where clause which is:
( A_SALESORDERSCHEDULELINE~SALESORDER, A_SALESORDERSCHEDULELINE~SALESORDERITEM ) IN ( ( 'XYZ', '000010' ), ( 'XYZ', '000020' ) )
with this one:
( A_SALESORDERSCHEDULELINE~SALESORDER = 'XYZ' AND A_SALESORDERSCHEDULELINE~SALESORDERITEM IN ( '000010', '000020' ) )
then the select statement is executed immidiatelly and the there is no performance issue !!
This is all a standard SAP code and we do not have a clear idea how to solve this problem.

Please, propose a solution.

Thank you,
Rosen Petrov

entry.title: Re: Cloud ERP - Opportunities, Challenges & SAP's Outreach
entry.content:
Kindly refer this post from Ranjitha Balaraman about customization capabilities with 𝗦𝗔𝗣 𝗦/𝟰𝗛𝗔𝗡𝗔 𝗖𝗹𝗼𝘂𝗱, 𝗔𝗜-𝗮𝘀𝘀𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗰𝗹𝗼𝘂𝗱 𝗕𝗔𝗱𝗜 𝗴𝗲𝗻𝗲𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 (𝗕𝗲𝘁𝗮)!

To join the Beta Testing, register here.

Registration window: Nov 5, 2024 - Dec 5, 2024
The program starts on: Dec 12, 2024

many thanks
Irene

entry.title: Re: Currency translation have no data in group reporting...

But it is strange that system prompt error to tell me that I must include the base unit and the document type in the selection. So I followed the error message in order to erase the system error alert. This make me so confused as I don't think I will need to include any dimension other than FS item and Subitem. Thanks again for keeping provide insight to me.

entry.title: Re: Unable to create a ATC variant S4 Hana 2022

entry.title: Where can I start learning how to managing the lifecycle of legal contract documents?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Overviewing SAP S/4HANA for Enterprise Contract Management learning journey.


Overview
This learning journey focuses on the fundamental knowledge of managing the lifecycle of legal contract documents using SAP S/4HANA for Enterprise Contract Management. After completing this learning journey, you will be able to execute all tasks related to managing the lifecycle of legal contract documents.

Learning objectives

  • Managing Contexts (Transaction/Process Templates)
  • Managing Legal Transactions
  • Managing Legal Documents
  • Managing Workflow Tasks
  • Signing Contract Documents (Manual & e-Signature)
  • Reporting & Collaboration

Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Second Half 2024 Release: What’s New in SAP SuccessFactors Mobile
entry.content:
In an increasingly mobile-driven world, employees expect to access work tools and resources as seamlessly as their personal apps. Recognizing this need, the SAP SuccessFactors mobile app continues to evolve, empowering HR teams and employees alike with enhanced accessibility and AI-driven features. With the 2H 2024 release, the app introduces new capabilities designed to streamline HR management tasks, improve engagement, and support the modern workforce. Let’s take a closer look at how these updates are making HR functions faster, smarter, and more adaptable to today’s demands.

Employee Central People Profile

In the people profile, we introduced several key innovations to enhance the mobile user experience. Users can now seamlessly switch between multiple  employments, enabling seamless access to profiles with multiple employments. Additionally, users can view, edit, and initiate SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central workflows directly within the app, delivering a comprehensive and efficient experience. Admin settings from the desktop version are now applied within the app as well, supporting spotlight card visibility preferences to match specific organizational needs. Together, these updates improve support for managing multiple employments, deliver a mobile-native experience for transactions, and reflect customized settings for diverse users—all in line with our commitment to a user-centered, adaptable, and high-performance HR solution on the go.

SAP SuccessFactors Learning

The SAP SuccessFactors integrated learning experience on mobile introduces new features that add value to the learner journey. Highlights include Learning Banners, an Offline Download section on ILX, Administrator Recommendations, and manager email nudges to encourage engagement. These updates provide users with relevant information, personalized recommendations, and offline access to learning content, making it easier for learners to stay informed and advance in their development. Together, these features boost learner engagement, personalize the learning journey, improve access to resources, and facilitate communication between managers and employees, contributing to a more dynamic and impactful learning experience. 

SAP SuccessFactors Goals Management

To streamline goal management, the SAP SuccessFactors mobile app now incorporates generative AI support for standard fields like name, description, and metric. Users will also see AI tags on goal detail and creation screens, making it easier and more efficient to set and track performance and development goals. These enhancements automate key aspects of goal setting and tracking, saving time and effort while driving productivity and fostering alignment with organizational objectives. 

In addition to our AI innovations in SAP SuccessFactors Performance and Goals, users can now easily access the received feedback view linked to their activities. This feature allows both managers and employees to quickly view feedback directly from the activity details page, enhancing contextual relevance and supporting informed decision-making in performance management.

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Time Management

The SAP SuccessFactors mobile app now supports displaying custom fields based on specific conditions. For example, a "Reason for Overtime" text field will only appear when the time type "Overtime" is selected. This targeted approach enhances data accuracy and completeness by ensuring that relevant information is captured and documented appropriately. Additionally, with this release, messages of all severity levels are now supported, ensuring users receive essential guidance. This functionality helps ensure compliance with company policies and regulations, equipping users with the necessary information before submitting leave requests or recording timesheet entries.

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Benefits

With this release, users can easily accomplish key tasks such as benefits enrollment, reporting life events, and managing family members. The app provides on-the-go access to current benefits and benefits statements, along with easy navigation through helpful links and resources configured by administrators.

 

SAP SuccessFactors Push Notifications

The SAP SuccessFactors mobile app now includes support for push notifications related to Time Management and Continuous Performance Management. This feature keeps HR professionals and employees updated on important information and tasks while on the go. Users receive instant alerts for new messages directly on their mobile devices, facilitating timely communication and enabling prompt action. As a result, this enhancement boosts overall productivity and engagement with the platform. Users have the option to choose which types of push notifications they receive.

 

I hope that this has given you helpful insights into what we delivered in our 2H 2024 release for the SAP SuccessFactors Mobile Application.

For more details please check the release notes here.

If you have questions, please leave them in the comments below, or ask them in the SAP SuccessFactors Mobile Forum.

For information on release highlights across the SAP SuccessFactors HCM suite, see the Release Highlights Overview article by Bianka Woelke and don’t miss her release video. And, read release our highlights brochure here.

Experience greater efficiency and enhanced performance by downloading the latest version of SAP SuccessFactors Mobile through the Apple App Store, Google Play Store, or Tencent App Store.

It's important to note that as of November 2024, the app will no longer support iOS 16.X on iPhone/iPad and Android 9.X. For more details, please refer to SAP SuccessFactors Mobile App to Deprecate Support for Apple iOS 16.X in November 2024 and SAP SuccessFactors Mobile App to Deprecate Support for Android 9.X in November 2024.

SAP SuccessFactors Mobile is a native app, which is available on iOS as well as on Android. It provides employees and managers access to HR activities anywhere at any time. The app is free of charge and can be used by every SAP SuccessFactors customer.

Where to find more information:

  • Overview video
  • View documentation to help you get started
  • Getting started with SAP SuccessFactors
  • SAP SuccessFactors community

entry.title: Create RAP Business Events for change pointers / IDocs
entry.content:
Dear all,

we are in an S/4HANA conversion project to S4H 2023 FPS1 On-Prem. On a separate note we are asked to provide a future looking concept for a more event base / pushed based integration landscape.

That being said I stumbled upon RAP Business Events, and my takeaway was that this ought to be the way forward for event based integration that originates from an ABAP Platform (here S4H 2023) system.

Now one of the current interfaces (of course) distributes parts of the material master to an external system. Currently this is pull, so the external system periodically asks for changes. We want to switch this to push, and levaraging an EDA, e.g. SAP Event Mesh in Integration Suite.

My questions

  1.  Is my assumption, that RAP Business Events is generally the future direction and would be a match for the requirement correct?
  2. If using RAP BE, how would we raise those events for a changed material? Can we use change pointers or existing BOR event linkages?
  3. Optional: What benefits will the also existing Event Enablement Add-On for S/4HANA play in such regard. Is it even necessary when we are on S4H 2023 FPS1 (I also read that with FPS2 some additional features arrive in the area of RAP

Many thanks and kind regards

Jens

entry.title: can you use a CAL S4HANA with SAP BTC?
entry.content:
Has someone come across this scenario. 

We want to try out the SAP BTC(Business transformation center) on cloud alm 

for this as source system , we need to use the on prem ECC EHP8 

as target system , if we use an CAL apppliance e.g. hosted on MS-Azure, will this setup work?

thanks SAP Cloud Appliance Library SAP Business Transformation Center

HI @cs4711

Margit

entry.title: Re: Share your insights from the SAP Transformation Excellence Summits 2024
entry.content:
Hi @JD_Wong_Loera ,

Thanks for sharing your insights and taking the time to respond! The event was indeed inspiring, and your thoughts on collaboration and process improvement are spot-on [as always :)].

Congrats again on joining the SAP Signavio Team! It's great to have you and I look forward to read all your upcoming blog posts.

entry.title: SAP BPA - Environment Variables
entry.content:
Hi All,

I'm working on an approval workflow on BPA (a simple Business Process with a step for an approval) and as of now, the approvers are simply "hardcoded" in the approval step:

 

 

As is, if we release and deploy the project and we want to change the approver in the future we would need to undeploy, go into the step and update the recipients, release and deploy again a new version of the project. Is there a cleaner way of doing this?

I was investigating the use of Environment Variables but I'm note sure if I understand the goal of these:

My idea was to have a variable for which I can define its value without having to deploy a new project version each time. I was expecting for this string environment variable to be available as a process input or variable to be referenced in the different steps, but I can't find it anywhere. Ideally, I'd like to change the value of this environment variable having it referenced in the approval step instead of a 'harcorded' user ID.

In Task Automation projects though I can see and use the environment variables that I define, but not in Business Processes.

 

I have been navigating the SAP Help Portal regarding environment variables but can't figure out how to use them, or if I can use them to achieve what I explained in this post.

If the intent of environment variables is not the above, does anyone have a better way of updating recipients of a task without having to deploy new project versions? Maybe @Dan_Wroblewski, any ideas?

Thanks!

entry.title: Lease posting run (set of cycle) to Obsolete status
entry.content:
How to set the Lease posting run (set of cycle) to Obsolete status?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Lease posting run (set of cycle) to Obsolete status
entry.content:
To set the Lease posting run in Obsolete status, you have to reverse the run first by following below steps.

  1. You can execute a valuation run multiple times. With each run, an Execution ID gets created. You can reverse a valuation run for a single Execution ID. To do so, select the valuation run you want to reverse and click on the Execution Details tab.

  2. Select the Execution ID of the run you want to reverse and click Reverse.

  3. Enter the required information:

    • Contract From/To ID

    • Posting Date

    • Closing Step

  4. Once you have provided the required information, you can set the run to active by clicking Set to Active.

  5. You can start the reversal process once you have set the run to active by clicking Start Now.

  6. Then the reversal run Id will be created with Obsolete status.

entry.title: Re: How to Create RAP Business Events in SAP S/4HANA On Premise 2022
entry.content:
Hi all,

is there a way to raise an Business Event for such things that normally would create an IDoc (say MATMAS)? Is this already build in? Are change pointers supported? Or would we need the minimal viable CDS stuff to make an RAP BE happen?

(Assuming an S/4HANA 2023 FPS1 on-prem system - but please also answer if that would onyl be supported on FPS2 or a future release)

entry.title: Re: Where can a database administrators start learning SAP HANA user management?
entry.content:
Great post, @Margit_Wagner! As an SAP Business ByDesign administrator, I found your insights on SAP HANA user management incredibly helpful. User management can be a complex area across SAP platforms, but your recommendation makes it much more approachable.

It would be fantastic to see a similar guide for those of us working in the SAP Business ByDesign environment—I'm sure many ByDesign admins would appreciate it! Thanks for sharing such valuable knowledge with the community!

entry.title: Re: Fiori Elements - Bullet Micro Chart in List Report
entry.content: Thanks for this blog. Is it possible to have multiple columns with micro bullet chart.

entry.title: Re: internal table data not getting reflected in adobe form when calling from driver program
entry.content: You defined the parameter in "IMPORT". Why are you passing via the obsolete word "TABLES"? You should pass via "CALL FUNCTION ... EXPORTING".

entry.title: Re: SAP PO B2B Add-On NRO (Number Range Object) Usage
entry.content:
SAP has increased some security settings from SAP PO 7.5 SP 27 and now I am getting below error while executing this module,

Transmitting the message to endpoint <local> using connection AFW failed, due to: com.sap.engine.interfaces.messaging.api.exception.MessagingException: javax.ejb.EJBException: ASJ.ejb.005044 (Failed in component: sap.com/nro~numberrangeapp) Exception raised from invocation of public com.sap.aii.af.lib.mp.module.ModuleData com.sap.aii.nro.TransmissionNumberModule.process(com.sap.aii.af.lib.mp.module.ModuleContext,com.sap.aii.af.lib.mp.module.ModuleData) throws com.sap.aii.af.lib.mp.module.ModuleException method on bean instance com.sap.aii.nro.TransmissionNumberModule@3d8ca2c6 for bean sap.com/nro~numberrangeapp*xml|sap.com~nro~numberrangemodule.jar*xml|TransmissionNumberModule in application sap.com/nro~numberrangeapp.; nested exception is: java.lang.SecurityException: The user does not have permission: applocking, Action: logical_locking_create


Any idea how to fix this without changing roles of GUEST user?

BR,
Devang

entry.title: Re: One way of create Custom Solution in C4C using SDK
entry.content:
Thanks for the description. So everytime you want to deploy a solution to SAP Sales you need the implemenation manager from the app studio and access to the SAP Sales tenant?

What if I want to deploy my solution on a complete different system? Or maybe deploy it even with another user who does not have access to Application Studio?

entry.title: Re: Purchasing a discounted certification attempt
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano,

I’m Ibrahim, an SAP ABAP Consultant from Egypt with over 2 years of experience in SAP ABAP development. I identify as someone who would benefit from this opportunity for a free certification attempt because I lack the financial means to afford the cost of a certification attempt on my own. I am also a first-generation college graduate in computer science, and I live in an area that may not have the same economic opportunities as more urban or privileged regions. Additionally, I belong to a minority group that may face challenges in accessing equal opportunities in my geographic location.

I truly enjoy working with SAP because it helps businesses improve their processes. It's amazing to see how technology can make such a significant difference. I want to continue learning and growing in this field to build a strong career.

I’m excited about the chance to obtain a free certification attempt because I believe it will help me deepen my knowledge and improve my professional skills. I understand that the tech world is always evolving, and I want to stay up-to-date with the latest developments. I’m grateful for this opportunity and excited about the possibilities ahead.

Thank you for considering my application for the free certification attempt.

Best regards,
Ibrahim

entry.title: Re: Success and Error messages in RAP validation logic
entry.content:
Hi @imihailovs 
if I understood the question correctly, try using the code to display messages below

 reported-zrswatovo = VALUE #(
  ( %msg = new_message_with_text( severity = if_abap_behv_message=>severity-success text = 'Dummy message' ) )
  ( %msg = new_message_with_text( severity = if_abap_behv_message=>severity-error text = 'Dummy message' ) )
  ( %msg = new_message_with_text( severity = if_abap_behv_message=>severity-warning text = 'Dummy message' ) )
  ( %msg = new_message_with_text( severity = if_abap_behv_message=>severity-information text = 'Dummy message' ) )
).

 

BR,
Oleg

entry.title: Re: Question about 10Steps2S4 for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Conversion in 2025
entry.content:
Hello, we are evaluating options for next year, but nothing is confirmed yet. We will inform our SAP S/4HANA community of our plans through the blog 10 Steps to S/4HANA for SAP Customers. It should be updated before the end of the year.

 

Regards,

Jose M.

@RAFIDY 

We had raise a high priority incident with SAP as this was affecting us badly. SAP has released a note and it says the fi should be shipped with 20/21 November.

3537263 - Error code: 1043 during Flat file upload via data upload starter - SAP for Me

 

Nikhil

entry.title: RFKK_CC_MD_PROCESS_ERRORS Processing Delays and Optimization
entry.content:
Hello, SAP Community.

I’m encountering an issue with the RFKK_CC_MD_PROCESS_ERRORS program. When I run it to automatically process distribution records with errors and reactivate distribution to SAP Convergent Charging, the program begins processing but never finishes, becoming seemingly "stuck" or taking an excessive amount of time — sometimes even days or hours to complete. This is not the expected behavior.

My goal is to set up this program to run every hour (job), automatically correcting provider contracts that, for various reasons, were not properly distributed. 

I would like to ask the community for advice on the following:

  1. Possible Causes: What might be causing this prolonged processing time or blocking?
  2. Configuration and Performance: Are there recommended configurations or adjustments to enhance the performance of this standard program?

Additionally, when I check the program in SE38, I receive several alerts that I’ve attached here along with the full source code in a .txt file for more detailed review.

Complementary information in SE38:

Thank you in advance for any guidance or recommendations.

Best,

Samuel

entry.title: Is there any way to create receipts even if we have 50% expired batches?
entry.content:
I would like to trigger receipts for sales orders by not considering the 50% expired batches including the lead time of the product.

Is there any way to achieve it in Standard MRP

entry.title: Re: No RFC authorization for function module RFCPING.
entry.content: Before, there was an RFCPING error. I asked the security team to add the authorization functions, and now this error log is appearing. I will send the information that you from the SAP community provided to the global team today. This topic refers to the response you gave in the other post; I asked the same question in both the new and the previous one. What you sent is a command to insert in the command line? Or inside SAP to be entered in SMGW at the path you explained? P TP=RFC_MSAFDFE HOST=10.xx.xxx.xx ACCESS=<list of application servers that should be allowed to call your JCo program> I’m not very familiar with infrastructure, but I’m learning more. Thank you for your help!

entry.title: Re: Error message in the external connector Jco with SAP
entry.content: Before, there was an RFCPING error. I asked the security team to add the authorization functions, and now this error log is appearing. I will send the information that you from the SAP community provided to the global team today. This topic refers to the response you gave in the other post; I asked the same question in both the new and the previous one. What you sent is a command to insert in the command line? Or inside SAP to be entered in SMGW at the path you explained? P TP=RFC_MSAFDFE HOST=10.xx.xxx.xx ACCESS=<list of application servers that should be allowed to call your JCo program> I’m not very familiar with infrastructure, but I’m learning more. Thank you for your help!

entry.title: Training for Partners on Localization as a Self-Service (Barcelona)
entry.content:
We are inviting partners to take part in a face-to-face workshop SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Localization as a Self-Service in Barcelona, where they can learn:

  • How to build extension scenarios using the capabilities of localization as a self-service.
  • How to build electronic invoicing scenarios and/or statutory reporting using the extensibility of SAP Document and Reporting Compliance.
  • How to apply various extensibility options to create a complete solution.

The training will be conducted in English. 

Learn more about the training here.

Registration link

entry.title: special character and space not allowed in code values
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I see when we create a custom field using code list in public cloud, it doesn't allow & and space in code values.

Do we have any other options where we can add special characters in the code values. Attaching screenshot for reference.

Regards,

Jagadhatri

#extensibility SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition ABAP Extensibility

entry.title: Re: Delta extraction of ADSO from SAP BW bridge into SAP Datasphere via Transformation Flow
entry.content: Yes, the delta mechanism looks at the active and change log and accordingly gives the delta output. Since you have deleted the change log table and doing init+delta, it is picking the data from the active table.

entry.title: Re: Authentication in BTP with Ariba
entry.content: https://help.sap.com/docs/ariba/ariba-network-2005-q2-2020-release-guide/ns-7373-application-gateway-supplier-access-to-non-sap-ariba-applications-via-single-sign-on

entry.title: Re: Delta extraction of ADSO from SAP BW bridge into SAP Datasphere via Transformation Flow

entry.title: Re: Restrict Data Import Connecation in SAC
entry.content: Yes, it was thx!

entry.title: Re: Comparative Analysis of SAP PaPM: Standard Model vs. Universal Model. Nutshell.
entry.content: Great post! It's clear you put a lot of effort into exploring this topic, and it’s very interesting to see how PaPM can impact our field and how the two models can be used for different approaches, each serving specific needs. Even though I’m still getting familiar with this area, I can see the value in having these flexible options. Looking forward to learning more from your insights, thanks for sharing!

entry.title: Shape the Future of SAP Concur with SAP Customer Engagement Initiative: Cycle 3 - 2024
entry.content:
Discover the power of SAP Concur, a cutting-edge solution that connects financial data and empowers businesses to take control of their spending. By automating spending processes, SAP Concur enables your business to run efficiently, anytime and anywhere, even in the most challenging circumstances.

SAP Concur is constantly evolving, and you have the opportunity to shape its future. Scroll through the list of SAP Customer Engagement Initiative projects for SAP Concur and get a sneak peek at the planned new features and functions. 

To participate in any of these projects, make sure to register on the Customer Influence website by November 15, 2024. Your participation will not only give you a voice in shaping the future of SAP Concur but also provide you with early insights into new features and functions.

So, what are you waiting for?

SAP Concur Solutions projects for registration:

  • Concur Expense - India GST handling
  • Concur Expense – Integrating Sales Opportunity Data with Concur Travel and Expense Data
  • Concur Expense - Preventing overspend through cost control, spend planning, and regulatory
  • Concur Expense - SAP Integration with Concur Solutions: Employee- and Benefit- focused Budget Manage...
  • Concur Expense – The Future of Expense Administration
  • Concur Travel - Trip Management / New Trip List
  • SAP Concur Solutions - Manage and track carbon consumption in T&E spend

Don't delay – register today on influence.sap.com and be a part of the SAP Customer Engagement Initiative Cycle 3 in 2024!  If you are also interested in other SAP Customer Engagement Initiative projects that are currently open for registration, check out the full list here.

Warm regards,

Your SAP Customer Engagement Initiative Team

Follow-up after registration: When you register for a project, you will be invited to an introductory call with the SAP project lead. At this point further participation is optional. Typically, all activities are governed by the Feedback Agreement with SAP.

entry.title: SAP Activate - Methodology for Shell Conversion
entry.content: In case of a selective data transition as a shell conversion, what is the recommended SAP methodology to use? Can anyone support?

entry.title: Re: SAP Digital Manufacturing | Automatic Triggers Subscr...
entry.content:
Hi Omer,

The truth is that I couldn't solve the problem, and due to time issues we finally didn't use the subscription and set timers which, although not optimal, served us well for what we wanted to do.

Regards,
JPP.

entry.title: Re: My customer is moving from ECC to RISE, MPLS issue
entry.content: Much Appreciated Amin!! Thank you for the valuable insight 🙂

entry.title: Restriction on Editing Approved Fields in Employee Profile and Workflow Page
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I hope you are doing well.

We have identified an issue with the editing capabilities in the Employee Profile and Workflow Page that needs to be addressed based on the following requirements:

Current Issue:

In the Employee Profile, we are currently able to edit the fields that have already been approved. The desired behavior is:

  • Once a field value is approved by the approver, no one should be able to edit the existing information, either in the Employee Profile or on the Workflow Page.
  • Only new information should be allowed to be added, and HR Admin should be the only role with permission to edit existing values.

Scenario 1:

  • In a specific MDF in the Employee Profile, an employee added new data. Then, on a different date, they added more data again. In this case, the employee is able to edit the previously entered information.
  • Desired behavior: Once the previous field is approved, it should automatically become non-editable and should remain in the Employee Profile as read-only, even if new data is added.

Scenario 2:

  • After an employee adds a new record in the MDF, it goes for approval. In this case, the approver is able to edit the existing record by clicking on the update button.
  • Desired behavior: The approver should only be able to update the new information and should not be able to edit any of the previously approved data.

In the attached screenshot, the colored line is existing information. while adding new data those fields should get non editable.

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

entry.title: What data needs to be filled in Data controller tab of Customer/Supplier LTMC template?
entry.content: I started migration of Customer master, and I came across data controller tab in the Customer Master LTMC template which was not there in the earlier version. What data should be there in that particular tab?

Hi,

 

could you please add a screenshot showing exactly what you mean? I double checked right now myself and the select more dialog is identical.

 

Here from the current cloud release:

 

And this is from a OP1909 test system:

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Re: New End User File Upload in SAP Analytics Cloud QRC3 2024
entry.content:
Hi @RAFIDY,

our development is working on this with top priority. If I understand it correctly the issue arises when there are measures in the target model that are not mapped in the file upload (which is a quite common situation). We will do our best to fix this as soon as possible...

 

Best regards

Gerd

entry.title: Re: internal table data not getting reflected in adobe fo...
entry.content:
I have tried with exporting parameters. it is throwing dump.

When calling function module "/1BCDWB/SM00000014", an attempt was made to pass
internal
table "LT_ZMATVALIDITEM" to formal parameter "GT_ZMATVALIDITEM". This resulted
in a type conflict
between the formal and actual parameters.

entry.title: Restricting Assigned Flat Numbers visibility in MDF Quarter Allotment
entry.content:
Hi Community,

We have a requirement regarding the MDF Quarter Allotment in Employee Central, specifically related to the Flat Number field, which is a picklist value.

Requirement:

  • Once a flat number has been assigned to an employee, it should no longer be visible in the dropdown list for other employees.
  • Only the non-allotted flat numbers should appear in the dropdown for any subsequent users.

Example Scenario:

  • If Flat 103 is assigned to Ramesh, when another employee, Yogesh, goes to the Quarter Allotment Portlet and clicks on the Flat Number dropdown, Flat 103 should not be visible in the list.
  • Yogesh should only see flat numbers that are not already assigned to any employee. so that assigned flat numbers are hidden from the dropdown once they have been allocated.

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

entry.title: Re: SAP Payroll HCM Advanced Leave Payment (Annual Leave)...
entry.content: okay once we make it as mashup, we can make business rule for make the automatic salary hold once the annual leave is approved ?

entry.title: Re: SAP Joule
entry.content:
Hi,

 

this is a quite broad question that you created here.

I would in general propose you have a look into the SAP community Joule topic: https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/joule

There is quite a lot of content and information with videos and blogs.

 

On the official product site you'll find more information about upcoming features, but also recent developments are displayed there: https://www.sap.com/products/artificial-intelligence/ai-assistant.html

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Re: SAP Payroll HCM Advanced Leave Payment (Annual Leave)...
entry.content: and what about Payroll effect in Advanced leave payment in Saudi localization case because if we did the salary hold it will stop payroll calculation on the system, and it must be triggered for advanced leave payments deductions in regular payroll till the employee come back and also the GOSI cost posting.

entry.title: Re: REMADV IDOC for Clearing Customer Credit Memo
entry.content:
Hi,

 

please have a look on the SAP Note: 2255988

https://me.sap.com/notes/2255988

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Request for Birthday Wishes Functionality in SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I hope you're doing well.

Currently, in SuccessFactors, only managers are able to view the upcoming birthday notifications of their reportees on the homepage. The requirement is to enhance this functionality by allowing users to send birthday wishes to employees directly from the birthday notification tab by clicking on the appeared link.

Requirement:

  • The Requirement is to add a feature that allows anyone (managers and possibly other users) to send birthday wishes to the employee on their special day, directly by clicking on the birthday notification link in the system.
  • This would make the birthday notification more interactive and help facilitate a more personal and engaging experience for employees.
    Thank you for your attention on this matter.
